args.content:
# Hawaii Packing List

Based on the vacation plans for Hawaii (June 10-20, 2024):

## Essential Items
- Swimwear (multiple sets for beach days)
- Reef-safe sunscreen (high SPF)
- Sunglasses and hat for sun protection
- Beach towels
- Water shoes for snorkeling

## Clothing
- Casual outfits for daily wear
- Light jacket or sweater for cooler evenings
- Workout clothes for hiking
- Nice outfit for the luau dinner
- Rain jacket (possible tropical showers)

## Activities Gear
- Snorkeling gear (mask, snorkel, fins)
- Hiking boots or sturdy shoes for Diamond Head trail
- Camera or smartphone for photos
- Waterproof phone case
- Reusable water bottle

## Personal Items
- Travel documents (passport, ID, flight tickets, hotel reservations)
- Credit cards and cash
- Medications
- Toiletries
- Reading material

## Electronics
- Phone and charger
- Camera and charger
- Universal power adapter
- Portable power bank

## Special Items for Planned Activities
- Swimwear and beach gear for Waikiki Beach (June 11)
- Snorkeling equipment for Hanauma Bay (June 12)
- Hiking gear for Diamond Head (June 13)
- Business casual attire for Pearl Harbor visit (June 14)
- Comfortable driving clothes for North Shore road trip (June 15)
- Traditional Hawaiian attire (optional) for luau (June 16)
- Spa-appropriate clothing for hotel spa day (June 17)
- Kayaking gear for Kailua Beach (June 18)
- Shopping bags for Ala Moana Center (June 19)
